purpose: Map the closed-loop Codex/Flywheel/local-model harness as a verifiable integration graph, separating observed surfaces from draft contracts, degraded dependencies, and missing execution evidence.

observed_live_signals.detail: forum.route returned a model-foundry validation architecture frame for the closed-loop schematic/evidence task.
index.index_context_envelope returned Transport closed for C:/dev in this update.
telos_room returned MATCH with 5 of 5 flagship tools ready in this update.

nodes.role: Sets scope, approval gates, endpoint/provider execution policy, and publication decisions.
Codex harness provider role for shared task comparisons.
Local closed-loop harness scripts, file store, benchmark orchestration, and outcome synthesis.
External harness role for future shared-task execution.
OpenCode harness role for future shared-task execution.
14B local model endpoint/release track.
32B local model endpoint/release track.
Preferred workspace context map and context-envelope provider.
Local fallback receipt path when Index MCP transport fails.
Routes ambiguous/cross-domain work and records communication/proof lanes.
Records route prompt hashes and optional observed Forum route-frame metadata.
Records configured tool roots plus optional non-secret MCP/tool status observations.
Source intake and corpus receipt path.
Verifier/checking seam for outcome validation.
Flagship room/context coordination surface.
Memory/context compression and enterprise-readiness track.
Relay/orchestration and enterprise-readiness track.
Plan/routing/schematic and enterprise-readiness track.
Inventory configured context roots without model/provider execution.
Static readiness receipts for mneme, relay, plexus, and peers.
Turns readiness receipts into hardening work plans.
Profiles local model endpoint configuration without probing generation.
Live 14B/32B endpoint health and generation probes.
Custom agentic task corpus for shared harness comparisons.
Maps task-set rows into manifests, coverage units, and scorecards.
Expands custom tasks into prompt hashes, planned artifacts, and manifest-only dry scorecard rows.
Defines comparable execution/receipt contract across Codex, Flywheel, Claude Code, OpenCode, local endpoints, and dry providers.
Expands the cross-harness contract into same-task prompt hashes and planned provider-role receipt rows.
Joins cross-harness roles with endpoint profile and account-lane metadata to expose adapter readiness and blocking gates.
Defines robotics latency, sensor grounding, code-drawing, multimodal, and affective-drift probes.
Expands embodied realtime probes into planned rows and dry scorecard placeholders.
Non-executing dry/focused/full command matrix and expected artifacts.
Provider roles, metric weights, dataset lanes, and artifact inventory.
Coverage report over expected benchmark/provider roles and artifacts.
Stores closed-loop receipts and outcome inputs.
Runs metadata preflights and later focused benchmark seed steps.
Compares Codex/Flywheel/provider result artifacts when they exist.
Synthesizes experimental outcome from executed artifacts.
Checks 14B/32B release evidence before publication.
Prepares publish plan after readiness evidence exists.
14B/32B model-card, provenance, checksum, endpoint, usage, benchmark, safety, and checklist templates.
Dedicated Forum ledger verify(deep=True) scaling benchmark surface.
Checks graph/report drift without validation, provider calls, endpoint probes, or benchmark execution.
Requirement-by-requirement proof ledger for the full active objective.

edges.meaning: Execution policy and approval gates control whether metadata, validation, endpoint, or provider lanes run.
Forum routes ambiguous/cross-domain work into proof/domain lanes.
Observed Forum routing metadata can be converted into durable route receipts.
Closed-loop seed records route receipts before benchmark planning and execution.
Index MCP health observations become structured tool-health metadata.
Forum callability observations become structured tool-health metadata.
Telos room status becomes structured tool-health metadata.
Closed-loop seed records tool health before benchmark planning and execution.
Preferred context envelope source when transport is healthy.
Fallback context receipt path when MCP transport is degraded.
Context roots and artifact inventory inform benchmark profile coverage.
Readiness receipts become hardening tasks.
Task corpus must be projected into manifests and scorecards before execution.
Adapter mappings drive prompt hash and planned artifact generation.
Manifest-only rows become planned coverage inputs before provider execution.
Provider adapters consume the same task ids and prompt hashes.
Provider roles and receipt requirements drive planned command matrix.
The contract is projected into same-task planned provider rows before execution.
The same provider-role contract is joined with endpoint/auth metadata to expose readiness gates.
Cross-harness planned rows become dry-tier evidence before provider execution.
Static endpoint profiles inform local 14B/32B adapter readiness before live gates.
Adapter readiness and blocking gates become dry-tier evidence before provider execution.
The embodied realtime contract is projected into planned probe rows before execution.
Embodied realtime planned rows become dry-tier evidence before provider execution.
Closed-loop seed records matrix metadata before provider execution.
Static endpoint profiles precede live endpoint health/generation probes.
14B agentic workflow readiness requires live endpoint gate evidence.
32B agentic workflow readiness requires live endpoint gate evidence.
Seed receipts and child artifacts are persisted for later outcome synthesis.
Outcome synthesis reads the receipt store and seed artifacts.
Coverage determines which provider comparisons are valid.
Comparison deltas feed the experimental outcome.
Publishing is blocked until readiness evidence passes.
Draft release artifacts become check targets once real model evidence exists.
Forum ledger scaling becomes a benchmark lane after execution artifacts exist.
Closed-loop seed can receipt graph/report drift status as metadata-only evidence.
Outcome completion is judged against explicit objective requirements, not only generated artifacts.

promotion_gates.required_evidence: Healthy index.index_context_envelope or explicit degraded fallback receipt with stale/fresh status.
Executed harness.mcp-tool-health/v1 receipt showing configured, observed, healthy, degraded, and missing-root posture for flagship tools.
Executed harness.forum-route-receipts/v1 receipt showing route prompt hashes and observed route-frame metadata when available.
Executed metadata-only command deck artifacts with JSON/Markdown receipts.
Implemented non-executing agentic task manifest generator and targeted validation after approval.
Provider-specific adapter discovery and manifest/scorecard rows for Codex, Flywheel, Claude Code, OpenCode, local_14b, local_32b, and dry roles.
Executed harness.adapter-runtime-matrix/v1 artifact showing manifest readiness, auth gates, endpoint-profile gates, and blocking gates for each provider role.
Executed harness.schematic-drift-check/v1 receipt with no missing required nodes, edges, files, or stale prose.
14B/32B endpoint profiles plus live endpoint gate receipts after approval.
Same task ids and prompt hashes executed through Codex and Flywheel, with comparable receipts.
forum.deep-verify-benchmark/v1 JSON artifacts across large entry/payload/storage/redaction profiles.
mneme, relay, and plexus shipped changes with package/docs/tests/CI/readiness receipts.
Model cards, checksums, provenance/licensing, endpoint instructions, benchmark evidence, release checklist, and publish approval.
Outcome synthesized from actual benchmark artifacts with metrics, raw paths, limitations, and next actions.
